title: Glow emerges from stealth at $1.2B valuation to challenge endpoint security in the AI era
snippet: Glow is targeting a new class of endpoint risks created by the rapid adoption of AI agents and developer tools inside enterprises.

title: Synthesia’s AI training platform is moving beyond videos into live coaching
snippet: Synthesia launched AI Roleplay Sessions, an interactive enterprise training platform where employees practice workplace conversations with AI avatars that provide feedback, scoring, and analytics to help companies measure training effectiveness.

title: Show HN: A new kind of FPS aim trainer
snippet:
I played a lot of Valorant and got mad, so I made an aim trainer that analyzes your raw crosshair movement to explore your raw motor and perceptual weaknesses instead of scoring scenarios.
It also chooses sens and difficulty as part of the tasks, and makes playlists that are optimal difficulty for you to learn and progress faster!
Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=49002276
Points: 64
# Comments: 31
